blended.narrative: Wildcat Mountain is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.2 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 2,416 ft. Looking ahead, 24 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 2.8" of snow, highs of 47°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 12" of heavy snow, highs of 28°F. Expect powder. Models disagree — check back.
